title: Merl's Official Trailer Textures
description: The official Minecraft trailer / promotional textures extracted from the Merl support agent background
body: This pack uses the official textures from the atlas extracted from the ["Merl" Support Agent](help.minecraft.net/hc/en-us) background files. It replaces many of the default block textures with the official "trailer-style" textures used in Mojang's promotional cinematics.
